overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in a cowboy hat and duster coat walking along a scenic riverbank through lush green countryside. The character wades through a shallow river section before continuing across grassy meadows under a bright partly cloudy sky.

events.description: character briefly veers left into tall bushes along the bank
character steps from grassy bank into the shallow river water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the grassy riverbank beside calm water, passing oak trees on the left

entered.detail: large layered rock formation rising steeply above the river edge
calm reflective water flowing through the green valley
large spreading oak tree with dense green foliage
rolling green hills dotted with wildflowers and tall grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a scenic riverbank with a large rocky cliff on the right and open grasslands on the left. The camera follows from behind as the character moves steadily forward, briefly brushing through bushes before approaching the water's edge.

events.description: water depth increases to waist level, creating larger splashes and slowing movement
character exits the water onto the opposite grassy bank

agents.ego_description: wading through the river, water rising from ankle to waist depth, then climbing out onto the far bank

segments.scene_description: The character wades into the river, with water splashing around their boots and rising to waist level in the deeper section near the rocky cliff. The camera captures the reflective water surface and the imposing rock wall now close on the right before the character climbs out onto the grassy shore.

agents.ego_description: walking away from the river across open grassland toward distant rolling hills

entered.detail: open field of tall green grass and wildflowers extending toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character walks across an open grassy meadow with the stream now narrowed to a small channel on the right. The rocky cliffs are left behind as the landscape opens up to rolling green hills and scattered trees under the bright sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a confined riverbank beside a towering cliff into an expansive, open meadow. It begins with the character walking steadily forward between a large rocky cliff and open grasslands, briefly brushing through bushes as they approach the water's edge. As the character wades into the river, the camera captures the reflective surface and the imposing rock wall looming close on the right before the character climbs back onto the grassy shore. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the cliffs behind, moving across a wide meadow where the river narrows into a small channel. Finally, the landscape expands into rolling green hills and scattered trees under a bright, open sky.
